final:
module RefModule (
    input wire clk,
    input wire rst,
    input wire serial_in,
    output reg [4:0] parallel_out
);
    reg [4:0] obf_shift_reg;

    always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
        if (rst) begin
            obf_shift_reg <= 5'b00000;
        end else begin
            obf_shift_reg <= {obf_shift_reg[3:0], serial_in}; // Shift left and insert serial_in
        end
    end

    always @(*) begin
        parallel_out = obf_shift_reg; // Output the shift register contents
    end
endmodule
